questionHtml: Sketch the graph of y=f1(x), stating the coordinates of the local maximum point.
markschemeHtml:
A1 for (1,  0.368) or 1, 1e labelled at local maximum (accept correct coordinates written away from the graph)

A1 for graph clearly starting at, or passing through, the origin

A1 for correct domain

A1 for correct shape i.e.: single maximum, and asymptotic behaviour (equation not required) (or point of inflexion)

 

[4 marks]
